data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Verified conversation log now matches the Take UI Terminal's design language: same surface colors (#1a1a2e/#16162a), border-white/10 borders, white-opacity text scale, font-mono + subpixel-antialiased typography. Font sizes bumped to 15px body/14px headers/17px title for readability. All four sanity gates pass: lint (0 errors), tsc clean, 2174 tests pass, build succeeds. Contract test added. Changes scoped to agent-history-view.tsx and interaction-picker.tsx only — no behavioral changes.
